info.title: Wasel Palestine API Documentation
info.description: API Documentation for Wasel Palestine backend project generated with swagger-autogen

get.summary: Test endpoint to verify the main app is working
The generated Swagger documentation JSON file
Health check endpoint to verify API is running

post.description: Creates a new user account with name, email, password, and role.
logins user in the system by entering email and password, and returns JWT token

get.description: Returns the profile of the authenticated user

put.description: Admin can update any user, Citizen can update their own data

post.description: Admin creates new user by entering user

400.description: User with this email already exists

post.description: Admin deactivates the user , the user can
Admin activates any user in the system ,an admin can activate citizens,moderators, and admins
Estimates the best route between two locations while considering traffic, checkpoints, constraints, and alternative routes.

400.description: Invalid routing request payload for provider

message.example: Invalid routing request payload for provider
Invalid routing request payload for provider

404.description: No route found for selected points or coordinates are not routable

message.example: No route found for selected points or coordinates are not routable
No route found for selected points or coordinates are not routable

get.description: Retrieves pending reports for moderation. Only Admin and Moderator can access this endpoint.

403.description: Forbidden - only Admin or Moderator can access moderation queue

message.example: Only moderators can access the moderation queue
Only moderators can access the moderation queue

500.description: Server error while retrieving moderation queue

get.description: Retrieves moderation queue statistics. Only Admin and Moderator can access this endpoint.

403.description: Forbidden - only Admin or Moderator can access moderation statistics

500.description: Server error while retrieving moderation statistics

get.description: Retrieves moderation logs. Only Admin and Moderator can access this endpoint.

parameters.name: performed_by
parameters.description: Filter logs by moderator/admin user ID

500.description: Server error while retrieving moderation logs

get.description: Retrieves potential duplicate reports. Only Admin and Moderator can access this endpoint.

403.description: Forbidden - only Admin or Moderator can access duplicate reports

500.description: Server error while retrieving duplicate reports

get.description: Retrieves all reports with info such as category, status, location radius, confidence, limit, and page.

parameters.name: radius_km
parameters.description: Radius in kilometers for location-based filtering

post.description: Allows an authenticated Citizen or Admin to submit a new road/checkpoint-related report.

200.description: Report submitted successfully, but similar reports exist nearby

message.example: Report submitted, but similar reports exist nearby
Report submitted, but similar reports exist nearby

403.description: Forbidden - only Citizen or Admin can submit reports

description.example: Checkpoint is closed and cars are waiting.

get.description: Retrieves report statistics, optionally filtered by category.

500.description: Server error while retrieving report statistics

get.description: Retrieves a single report by its ID.

delete.description: Deletes a specific report. Only Admin and Moderator can access this endpoint.

403.description: Forbidden - only Admin or Moderator can delete reports

get.description: Retrieves the audit trail for a specific report.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of audit records to return

500.description: Server error while retrieving audit trail

get.description: Retrieves comments for a specific report.

content.example: This is a comment on the report.
This is a comment on the report.

post.description: Allows an authenticated user to add a comment to a specific report.

content.example: This is a comment on the report.
This is a comment on the report.

comment.example: I passed from there 10 minutes ago and it is still closed.

post.description: Allows an authenticated user to vote on a specific report.

500.description: Server error while voting on report

post.description: Allows Admin or Moderator to approve, reject, or otherwise moderate a specific report.

403.description: Forbidden - only Admin or Moderator can moderate reports

delete.description: Deletes a specific comment from a report. The user must be authenticated.

403.description: Forbidden - user cannot delete this comment

get.description: Retrieves all checkpoints with filtering, searching, sorting, and pagination.

post.description: Creates a new checkpoint. Only Admin and Moderator can access this endpoint.

400.description: Invalid checkpoint data. Name and city are required

message.example: Invalid checkpoint data. Name and city are required
Invalid checkpoint data. Name and city are required

403.description: Forbidden - only Admin or Moderator can create checkpoints

message.example: Forbidden - only Admin or Moderator can create checkpoints
Forbidden - only Admin or Moderator can create checkpoints

get.description: Retrieves a specific checkpoint by its ID.
Retrieves status change history for a specific checkpoint.

500.description: Server error while fetching checkpoint history

message.example: Server error while fetching checkpoint history
Server error while fetching checkpoint history

put.description: Updates the status of a checkpoint and saves the change in checkpoint history and moderation logs. Only Admin and Moderator can access this endpoint.

400.description: Invalid status value. Status must be one of: active, closed, restricted

message.example: Invalid status value. Status must be one of: active, closed, restricted
Invalid status value. Status must be one of: active, closed, restricted

403.description: Forbidden - only Admin or Moderator can update checkpoint status

message.example: Forbidden - only Admin or Moderator can update checkpoint status
Forbidden - only Admin or Moderator can update checkpoint status

500.description: Server error while updating checkpoint status

message.example: Server error while updating checkpoint status
Server error while updating checkpoint status

reason.example: Checkpoint closed due to security restrictions.

get.description: Retrieves all incidents with filtering, sorting, and pagination.

post.description: Allows any authenticated user to create a new incident. The incident is created with open status.

message.example: Validation error: Missing required fields or invalid data types
Validation error: Missing required fields or invalid data types

description.example: The checkpoint is currently closed and vehicles are waiting.

get.description: Retrieves a specific incident with checkpoint name, creator name, and verifier name.

put.description: Allows Admin or Moderator to update an incident status to open, verified, or closed. When an incident is verified, an alert is created ans sent to the subscribed users.

400.description: Invalid status value. Status must be one of: open, verified, closed

message.example: Invalid status value. Status must be one of: open, verified, closed
Invalid status value. Status must be one of: open, verified, closed

403.description: Forbidden - only Admin or Moderator can update incident status

message.example: Forbidden: only Admin or Moderator can update incident status
Forbidden: only Admin or Moderator can update incident status

500.description: Server error while updating incident status

message.example: Server error while updating incident status
Server error while updating incident status

reason.example: Incident verified by moderator after checking reports.

post.description: Authenticated Citizen creates a new alert subscription using category and geographic details.

message.example: Subscription already exists for this user
Subscription already exists for this user

403.description: Forbidden - only citizens can create subscriptions

Forbidden: You do not have the required permissions
Error creating subscription for this user
Error creating subscription for this user

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID whose subscriptions will be deleted

Forbidden: You do not have the required permissions

404.description: No subscriptions found for this user

No subscriptions found for this user

Forbidden: You do not have the required permissions

delete.description: Deletes a specific alert subscription based on user ID, latitude, longitude, and radius.

Forbidden: You do not have the required permissions

get.summary: Get all alert subscriptions for a specific user
get.description: Gets all alert subscriptions for a specific user(Admin and Moderator can view any user subscriptions, Citizen can view their own subscriptions)

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID whose subscriptions will be retrieved

get.summary: Get all alerts (Admin and Moderator only)

post.description: Receives webhook updates sent by Telegram. If the update contains a message, it is processed by the bot message handler.

200.description: Telegram update received and processed successfully

500.description: Server error while handling Telegram webhook
